creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you aware of the Porter's Handbook that documents everything about a port?

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html

If you still think you're not capable of basic maintenance even with the handbook at your disposal, that's ok.  However, unless you can find someone else to volunteer to maintain the port, we aren't going to revive it.

Thanks,
John
